subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Lord of Manifestation hath revealed unto him whose letter reached the Wronged One whilst He was in the Most Great Prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله مالک الظهور الی الذی حضر کتابه لدی المظلوم اذ کان فی السجن الاعظم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @suffering and imprisonment
